hero.title: Selina Li Daycare
hero.subtitle: Where Every Child Shines
hero.description: A nurturing home daycare in San Leandro offering quality childcare with Chinese language immersion and homemade nutritious meals.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We provide a warm, safe, and stimulating environment where children can learn, play, and grow. Our experienced staff is dedicated to nurturing each child's unique potential.
about.philosophy: We believe that every child deserves a loving environment where they can explore, discover, and develop at their own pace. Our bilingual program introduces children to Mandarin and Cantonese while building strong foundations for lifelong learning.

infant.title: Infant Care
infant.description: Gentle, nurturing care for your little ones with individualized attention and developmental activities.

toddler.title: Toddler Program
toddler.description: Active exploration and early learning through play, music, and creative activities.

preschool.title: Preschool
preschool.description: Preparing children for kindergarten with structured learning, social skills, and school readiness.

chinese.title: Chinese Immersion
chinese.description: Daily Mandarin and Cantonese instruction including stories, songs, and cultural activities.

schedule.subtitle: A structured day full of learning and fun
schedule.food: Lunch and dinner are included, with daily snacks, fruit, and milk.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know
faq.faq_hours_a: We are open Monday through Friday, 8:30 AM to 6:00 PM. We are closed on weekends and major holidays.
faq.faq_meals_a: We provide breakfast/morning snack, lunch, and afternoon snack daily. Our meals feature healthy Chinese cuisine with varied and nutritious options.
faq.faq_enrollment_q: How do I enroll my child?
faq.faq_enrollment_a: Please contact us by phone to schedule a visit. We'll give you a tour of our facility and discuss your child's needs. Enrollment is based on availability.
faq.faq_curriculum_a: Our curriculum includes Mandarin and Cantonese instruction, storytelling, arts and crafts, music, outdoor play, and park trips. We also celebrate holidays like Easter and Halloween with special events.
faq.faq_safety_q: What safety measures do you have?
faq.faq_safety_a: Safety is our top priority. Our facility is licensed, clean, and child-proofed. We maintain low child-to-staff ratios and have strict pick-up procedures.
faq.faq_communication_q: How do you communicate with parents?
faq.faq_communication_a: We provide daily updates about your child's activities, meals, and development. Parents can contact us anytime with questions or concerns.

contact.title: Contact Us
